dict.string: TUICommander uses the microphone for speech-to-text dictation into the terminal.
TUICommander runs a local HTTP server for MCP integration and remote terminal access.
Terminal commands may need to access music files in your library.
Terminal commands may need to access photos in your library.
Terminal commands may need to access files on your Desktop.
Terminal commands may need to access files in your Documents folder.
Terminal commands may need to access files in your Downloads folder.
Terminal commands may need to access files on external drives.
Terminal commands may need to access files on network volumes.
Terminal commands may need to access your calendar data.
Terminal commands may need to access your contacts.
